summary: Added summary buckets and ranked review candidates for mark_scheme_text foreign-label failures.

files_changed.why: Exposed mark_scheme_text_foreign_label_summary and mark_scheme_text_foreign_label_review_candidates derived from the existing failure records.
Extended the foreign-label fixture to assert the new summary and ranking output without changing failure semantics.

test_results: Initial targeted test failed as expected because mark_scheme_text_foreign_label_summary was absent.
Live audit still exits 1 because current output contains known integrity failures, but it now includes ranked foreign-label candidates.
repo_hygiene_notes: No generated output was intentionally modified by this iteration.
The live audit report was written under the run folder.
known_risks: The new summary ranks review work; it does not repair stale text or rendered image artifacts.
